description: Cross-vector probes (docs/design/lab.md §4.6). X02 (AppleScript during URL-error modal) lives in the A-suite as A43. X05 (cold-start races) is deliberately omitted: it is inherently nondeterministic and would break the identical-verdicts acceptance gate; race behavior is bounded instead by the serialized-probe rule in the write API design.

probes.title: cross-vector identity: create via AppleScript, mutate via URL, verify via SQLite — one stable uuid

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"X01-ITEM"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='X01-ITEM'

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='X01-RENAMED' AND start=1

probes.title: rapid interleave across vectors: three back-to-back mutations, no waits between — all land

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new to do with properties {name:"X03-B"}

probes.title: delete + re-add same title: identity is NOT reused — two rows, one trashed

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='X04-ITEM'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete to do id "{uuid:X04-ITEM}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='X04-ITEM' AND trashed=1
SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='X04-ITEM' AND trashed=0
